title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) to Donate the Following Vehicles Purchased by the Municipal Government : One (1) Unit Foton 6 - Wheeler Dumptruck to Barangay Timugan Purchased by the Municipal Government Thru Cost Sharing Scheme, the Municipal Share Chargeable Against the 20% Municipal Development Fund Continuing Appropriation Cy 2021 Amounting to Seven Hundred Fifty Thousand (P 750,000.00) and Ratifying
